title: bump(github.com/containers/storage,github.com/containers/image)
body:
Bump github.com/containers/storage and github.com/containers/image, to commits 06b6c2e4cf254f5922a79da058c94ac2a65bb92f and 93bced01015eb94bec4821df1876314be8197680, respectively.

This should incorporate the fixes for manifest digest mismatches that were made for CRI-O in https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/pull/2066 and https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/pull/2071.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *nalind* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v1.0/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Oh dear, it's the 1.0 branch. CI is 100% broken here, the code to actually run Papr was removed on their end.
Need to land #2891 first to fix CI for this branch
@nalind Please rebase and we can merge
Rerunning ubuntu test - seems like it's a flake. Will merge once green.
